stories.cause: tautulli have no API key in env or on disk
stories.description: Endpoints that depend on these services (libraries, recent additions, indexer stats) will return empty payloads until the keys are populated. Re-run the discover-api-keys job, or set the key manually under Services.
stories.headline: API key discovery is incomplete — 1 service(s) have no credential
stories.next_action: Re-run discover-api-keys from the Jobs panel, or POST /api/services/<id>/api-key with a value.

stories.description: Indexers, the *arrs, and download clients are all responding.
stories.headline: Downloads are working

stories.description: Your media server is responding to play requests.
stories.headline: Playback is working

stories.description: Users can search and request new content.
stories.headline: Content search is working
